description: A regulatory compliance audit has mandated several organizational changes. Implement the requirements detailed in the corrective action notice located at ~/Desktop/compliance_corrective_action.txt within Sentrifugo. You must rename the 'DevOps & Infrastructure' department to 'Infrastructure & Cloud Operations', create an 'Environmental Health & Safety' department, update job title codes for Systems Engineer, Network Administrator, and Marketing Specialist to match federal SOC codes, reassign Kevin Brown, Amanda Davis, Andrew Thomas, and Christopher Lee to their new departments, and deactivate the 'Maintenance & Support' department. Refer to the document for exact department codes, job title codes, and specific assignments.
